text:
To understand how "[YTP] Physco Swift's wet & Waterproof Worldwide Destruction." Has become a multi-layered thematic take on the old Greek tale:  "Πίτσα με τυρί" About the struggles of the Modern man in a society that is keeping him down we must first look at the various motifs used in the video here I will be deconstructing those very symbols or important points and how it relates to the greek tale 

The first thing one has to look at is the illuminati symbol many believe that it is an acient cult or a clever internet meme however cs188 uses it to relate to the protagonist agapios in the greek tale mentioned above it is important because in the greek tale agapios finds a trianglular statue in the city of of Megara where people are worshipping this statue the reason cs188 uses the symbol is to pay homage to that portion of the tale because the original author intended for that to be a joke about how the modern man would believe in anything and cs knows that hence injecting it into his video

in a later part of the video cs188 manipulates the audio to make it say "You can seal up doo doo, so you can play with dry poop." the meaning of this sentence is strang however if you think about it it is another reference to the greek play wherein agapios finds a pig playing in its fecal matter but the pig is dry so when it says "you can seal up doo doo." cs188 calls back to when the hero of the greek tale thought about doing the samething to live like a pig in other words it ties in with being in tune with our animalistic natural state in which the modern man isn't in touch with the pigs

by the end of the video cs188 adds in audio from some older rock song in which the lyrics say "wastin my time" this was in fact taken from the song at the end of agapios' journey where as he had slain the king of grease  Atair  this audio is overlayed for a bit onto the clip of the man in the video spraying the can the reason this is important because agapios thought that he had just wasted his time doing something that had felt so mundane to him which he had been in touch with his self this is the plight of the modern man to become entrenched in his animalistic nature in which one done cannot go return from.

cs188's video remains a holy grail of information in which the modern man cannot trully understand the plight of the creator this is where it relates to the play heavily because cs188 feels like his is  agapios although we will never know due to the many wonderful themes and rich symbolic meaning which simply cannot be encapsulated into a single phrase.
